notes: Structured official golf and miniature-golf facts used when Disney's SPA/API source is source-backed but too sparse for precise guest-facing price and location display.

facts.title: Disney's Magnolia Golf Course
facts.location_label: Disney's Magnolia Golf Course, near Shades of Green Resort
facts.description: Disney's longest championship golf course, reimagined with elevated tees, redesigned bunkers, re-contoured Bermuda greens, water hazards, and Disney-themed hole names.

availability.label: Tee-time based; rates and availability vary

price.notes: Green fees vary by season, day of week, and tee time; use the official Golf WDW rates and booking tools for exact pricing.

amenities: Complimentary taxi transportation from select Walt Disney World Resort hotels
evidence_lines: Disney's Magnolia Golf Course page: Adults / Book Tee Time.
Disney's Magnolia Golf Course page: designed in classic Tour style and the longest of the Walt Disney World Resort golf courses.
Golf WDW rates page: greens fees vary seasonally and also depend on the day of week and time you choose to play.
Golf WDW rates page: Public Day and Resort Guest rates vary seasonally and by day of week and tee time.

facts.title: Disney's Palm Golf Course
facts.location_label: Disney's Palm Golf Course, near Shades of Green Resort
facts.description: An 18-hole championship course redesigned by Arnold Palmer Course Design, with lakes, palm trees, tropical sands, sloping greens, and 59 bunkers.

availability.label: Tee-time based; rates and availability vary

price.notes: Green fees vary by season, day of week, and tee time; use the official Golf WDW rates and booking tools for exact pricing.

amenities: Complimentary taxi transportation from select Walt Disney World Resort hotels
evidence_lines: Disney's Palm Golf Course page: Adults / Book Tee Time.
Disney's Palm Golf Course page: 18-hole championship course operated by Arnold Palmer Golf Management.
Golf WDW rates page: greens fees vary seasonally and also depend on the day of week and time you choose to play.
Golf WDW rates page: Public Day and Resort Guest rates vary seasonally and by day of week and tee time.

facts.title: Disney's Oak Trail Golf Course
facts.location_label: Disney's Oak Trail Golf Course, near Shades of Green Resort
facts.description: A family-friendly 9-hole, par-36 walking course with junior tees and holes ranging from 132 to 517 yards from the white tees.

availability.label: Tee-time based; rates and availability vary

price.notes: Golf rates vary by season, day of week, and tee time; use the official Golf WDW rates and booking tools for exact pricing.

amenities: Complimentary taxi transportation from select Walt Disney World Resort hotels
evidence_lines: Disney's Oak Trail Golf Course page: Adults / Book Tee Time.
Disney's Oak Trail Golf Course page: golf carts are not allowed; this is a walking-only course.
Golf WDW rates page: Oak Trail rates vary seasonally and by day of week and tee time.
Golf WDW rates page: Junior rate under 18 is 25% off applicable adult rate.

facts.title: Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course
facts.location_label: Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa
facts.description: A classic 18-hole country-club style course near Disney Springs with pine forests, palmettos, sparkling lakes, elevated bunkered greens, and a challenging island green.

availability.label: Currently closed for renovations expected to continue through fall 2026

price.notes: Green fees vary by season, day of week, and tee time when the course is available; use the official Golf WDW rates and booking tools for exact pricing.

amenities: Complimentary taxi transportation from select Walt Disney World Resort hotels
evidence_lines: Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course page: Adults / Book Tee Time.
Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course page: currently closed for renovations expected to continue through fall 2026.
Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course page: Golf Shop remains open daily from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM during renovations.
Golf WDW rates page: greens fees vary seasonally and also depend on the day of week and time you choose to play.

facts.title: Walt Disney World Golf
facts.description: Official Walt Disney World golf pricing and tee-time information for Disney's championship and 9-hole golf courses.

availability.label: Tee-time based; rates and availability vary

price.notes: Rates vary by season, day of week, and tee time; use the official Golf WDW rates and booking tools for exact pricing.

amenities: Seasonal, twilight, junior, replay, and eligibility discounts
evidence_lines: Golf WDW rates page: Walt Disney World Golf promotes a Best Price Guarantee for booking tee times online or by phone.
Golf WDW rates page: greens fees vary seasonally and also depend on the day of week and time you choose to play.
Golf WDW rates page: Junior rate under 18 is 25% off applicable adult rate; same-day replay is 25% off.

facts.title: Sunset 9-Hole Golf Promotion
facts.location_label: Sunset 9 at participating Walt Disney World golf courses
facts.description: A 9-hole golf promotion at select Walt Disney World golf courses with special late-day pricing and 2 complimentary beverages.

availability.label: Late-day tee times vary by season

price.notes: Sunset 9 seasonal rates currently range from $39 - $75 before tax, depending on date and course.

evidence_lines: Disney Sunrise 9 / Sunset 9 page: special pricing along with 2 complimentary beverages on a 9-hole round of golf.
Golf WDW rates page: Sunset 9 seasonal table lists $55 - $65, $65 - $75, and $39 - $49 periods.
Golf WDW rates page: current Sunset 9 public range across listed seasons is $39 - $75.

facts.title: Fantasia Gardens and Fairways Miniature Golf
facts.location_label: Walt Disney World Swan Hotel at EPCOT Resort Area
facts.description: Two 18-hole miniature golf adventures: the whimsical Fantasia Gardens course and the skill-focused Fantasia Fairways course.

availability.label: Operating hours vary; same-day walk-ups welcome

price.notes: $19 per Adult, $12 per Child (Ages 3-9) (tax not included)

amenities: Next-day and later booking by phone
evidence_lines: Disney Fantasia Gardens and Fairways Miniature Golf page: Located in Walt Disney World Swan Hotel at EPCOT Resort Area.
Disney Fantasia Gardens and Fairways Miniature Golf page: $19 per Adult, $12 per Child (Ages 3-9) (tax not included).
Disney Fantasia Gardens and Fairways Miniature Golf page: Walk-ups are welcome; for next-day booking and beyond, call (407) WDW-PLAY.

facts.description: Two 18-hole miniature golf adventures themed to Santa's off-season retreat: the Summer Course and the Winter Course.

price.notes: $19 per Adult, $12 per Child (Ages 3-9) (tax not included)

amenities: Next-day and later booking by phone
